description: You are a network controller validating the ground system's Loss-of-Signal (LOS) reporting procedures using OpenC3 COSMOS. Simulate a network dropout by disconnecting the active interface for the INST target for at least 15 seconds before reconnecting it. Document the event in a JSON report at /home/ga/Desktop/los_event_report.json including the 'interface_name', 'los_timestamp' (ISO 8601 UTC), 'aos_timestamp' (ISO 8601 UTC), 'gap_duration_seconds', and 'recovery_successful' (boolean). OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
